title: Smoky Thai Stoned Dates Stir-fry
description: A smoky and indulgent Thai-inspired dish featuring air-fried stoned dates, perfect for a whole30-friendly meal.
instructions: Gently heat water in a small saucepan over medium heat.
While the water is heating, peel and mince garlic cloves.
In another pan, sauté minced garlic until fragrant. Add fish sauce and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Fold in tamarind paste and cook for an additional minute or until mixture thickens slightly.
Add stones dates, red chilies, and Kaffir lime leaves to the pan. Stir-fry all ingredients together.
Stir occasionally as the water in the saucepan starts to boil vigorously, then pour onto stir-fried dates and continue cooking for 2 minutes or until the mixture begins to stick together.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
